Construction: High-strength steel body with forged L-Face / V-Taper design
CoreTech: Max Impact Technology / split high-density tungsten / progressive groove design
BendNotes: Forged-face players-distance iron; routine Titleist iron loft/lie adjustments should be conservative and verified after bending. Fitting system supports loft/lie testing; use normal shop caution.
TargetPlayer: Player seeking speed, stability and consistency in a more forgiving players-distance shape.
Notes: Additive delta row for standard T250 only. Official current Titleist T-Series T250; launched 2025 and positioned as players-distance successor to T200. SourceURL: https://www.titleist.com/product/t250/561C.html; SpecURL: https://fairwayjockey.com/products/titleist-2025-t250-custom-irons
